# Security Policy

Please do not publish security issues in public issues.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting when available, or contact the maintainer privately with a minimal reproduction and redacted logs.

## Scope

Relevant reports include exposed credentials, unsafe proxy behavior, token leakage, SSRF-style routing issues, dependency vulnerabilities with a working exploit path, and bugs that can expose private user configuration.

## Out of scope

Provider downtime, scraper selector drift and third-party anti-bot failures are normal operational issues unless they expose sensitive data.
